corpus_building.implemented_as: The TXT paper is converted into a section-aware annotated mini-corpus.

tokenization.implemented_as: Every concept phrase and sentence is normalized into tokens for counts and n-grams.

normalization.implemented_as: Lower-casing and punctuation cleanup are used for phrase matching and deduplication.

n_gram.implemented_as: Concept length and document top unigrams/bigrams/trigrams are exposed.

bow_and_naive_bayes.implemented_as: Section BoW hits act as class-conditional section evidence for intro/method/experiment/conclusion style decisions.

tf_idf_document_term_matrix.implemented_as: Document-level frequency and TF-IDF matrices expose which section concepts are characteristic of this paper.

laplace_smoothing.implemented_as: P(section | concept) uses add-one smoothing, so unseen section-concept pairs are not forced to zero.

evidence_cue_lexicon.implemented_as: Cue phrases such as propose, achieve, outperform, and BLEU give transparent rule-based evidence hints.

sequence_labeling.implemented_as: The first model contributes BIO boundary evidence for concept phrase extraction.

canonicalization_noisy_channel_style.implemented_as: Observed surface phrases are mapped to canonical terms with an alias confidence score.

top_candidates.sentence: As such, we decided to re-evaluate the network design of StyleGAN and search for an architecture that produces high-quality images without progressive growing.
As such, we decided to re-evaluate the network design of StyleGAN and search for an architecture that produces high-quality images without progressive growing.
In Figure we simplify this design by upsampling and summing the contributions of RGB outputs corresponding to different resolutions.
This design is similar to LAPGAN without the per-resolution discriminators employed by Denton et al.
However, a residual architecture was harmful in the generator -the lone exception was FID in LSUN CAR when both networks were residual.
Our improved architecture has one fewer noise input because we do not add noise to the learned 4×4 constant (Figure ).
This is approximately the cost of training the network for another dataset without hyperparameter tuning.
In Figure we further modify the design to use residual connections.
The style-based GAN architecture (StyleGAN) yields state-of-the-art results in data-driven unconditional generative image modeling.
The style-based GAN architecture (StyleGAN) yields state-of-the-art results in data-driven unconditional generative image modeling.
We expose and analyze several of its characteristic artifacts, and propose changes in both model architecture and training methods to address them.
We expose and analyze several of its characteristic artifacts, and propose changes in both model architecture and training methods to address them.
Overall, our improved model redefines the state of the art in unconditional image modeling, both in terms of existing distribution quality metrics as well as perceived image quality.
The current state-of-the-art method for high-resolution image synthesis is StyleGAN , which has been shown to work reliably on a variety of datasets.
It has been demonstrated that this design allows the intermediate latent space W to be much less entangled than the input latent space Z.
We identify two causes for these artifacts, and describe changes in architecture and training methods that eliminate them.
First, we investigate the origin of common blob-like artifacts, and find that the generator creates them to circumvent a design flaw in its architecture.
First, we investigate the origin of common blob-like artifacts, and find that the generator creates them to circumvent a design flaw in its architecture.

We propose an alternative design that achieves the same goal -training starts by focusing on low-resolution images and then progressively shifts focus to higher and higher resolutions -without changing the network topology during training.

We propose an alternative design that achieves the same goal -training starts by focusing on low-resolution images and then progressively shifts focus to higher and higher resolutions -without changing the network topology during training.

We propose an alternative design that achieves the same goal -training starts by focusing on low-resolution images and then progressively shifts focus to higher and higher resolutions -without changing the network topology during training.
This new design also allows us to reason about the effective resolution of the generated images, which turns out to be lower than expected, motivating a capacity increase (Section 4).

Precision and Recall (P&R) provide additional visibility by explicitly quantifying the percentage of generated images that are similar to training data and the percentage of training data that can be generated, respectively.

Precision and Recall (P&R) provide additional visibility by explicitly quantifying the percentage of generated images that are similar to training data and the percentage of training data that can be generated, respectively.
To counter its computational expense, we also propose executing all regularizations less frequently, observing that this can be done without compromising effectiveness.

downstream_contract.intended_use: Feed this JSON to a later local open-source model to write an overview.
downstream_contract.grounding_rule: The downstream generator should write from evidence_units.location.sentence and context_window, not from unsupported outside knowledge.
downstream_contract.score_warning: Scores are ranking and filtering signals, not calibrated probabilities.
